commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Transform stream that drops blank MCP stdio lines before `StdioServerTransport` and resolves the server wait when filtered stdin ends.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main sends raw stdin to the MCP SDK, and the SDK parses every newline-delimited line with `JSON.parse`, so a blank line reaches the parser as invalid JSON. I did not execute current main because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a narrow code repair ClawSweeper can provide.

target.title: fix(mcp): ignore blank stdio input
target.body:
Fixes oracle-mcp stdio handling when blank lines reach stdin.

Changes:
- Filters blank/whitespace-only stdio lines before the MCP SDK parses JSON-RPC.
- Resolves the MCP server cleanly when filtered stdin reaches EOF, which keeps the npx oracle-mcp route from exiting with Node's unsettled top-level await warning.

Verification:
- pnpm run build
- printf '

' | timeout 5 node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js oracle-mcp
- initialize JSON-RPC smoke via node dist/bin/oracle-cli.js oracle-mcp
- same blank-line and initialize smoke via global npx @steipete/oracle oracle-mcp
target.author: gustavosmendes
